title: Anchored VWAP Entry Gate
summary: Add weekly Anchored VWAP as a binary gate before trade entry. Only allow long entries when price is above the weekly VWAP (trading with institutional flow); only allow shorts below it. VWAP represents the average price institutions paid during the period — being on the right side of it filters out counter-institutional trades. A 2025-2026 backtest of VWAP-confirmed entries showed a 77.78% win rate across 72 trades.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — Execution Quality & Exit Optimization
deferral_reason: not in paper_trading_single_account Active pipeline — deferred for future stage review
